description: Core Maintainer of GitMesh — a Linux Foundation multi-agent orchestration runtime with OPA policy-as-code and MCP governance. Grew adoption to 140+ GitHub stars.
highlights: Championed a Linux Foundation multi-agent orchestration runtime, growing adoption to 140+ stars by collaborating on an OPA policy-as-code layer to strictly govern autonomous AI tools via MCP

Led the Phase Two architecture pivot to an LF-aligned TypeScript monorepo, scaling the project to 20 active contributors and achieving OpenSSF certification, by optimizing an ACP (JSON-RPC 2.0) orchestrator and a Postgres audit log

description: Directed PARAM — a production blockchain academic-credential platform with a live pilot across 6 departments and 6 degree programs at ABV-IIITM Gwalior.
highlights: Live pilot across 6 departments and 6 degree programs — Next.js 16 + Express 5 monorepo with Privy auth and 5-role RBAC
Scalable credential issuance pipeline validated by 100+ automated tests — Redis-backed BullMQ workers for async NFT mints and a 37-model Postgres schema
ERC-721 credentials on Base Sepolia with SHA-256 anchoring; public verification with share links, QR, and hash/tokenId API

description: End-to-end Online Testing Infrastructure with pilot 50+ active users
highlights: Built complete platform for exam preparation.
Developed Complete Admin Panel with Complete Test, Questions and User Management.

description: Founding Engineer at Garudex Labs — real-time traffic edge system (patent + AICTE IDE 2025 Best Startup Pitch) and 15-agent AI SaaS backend.
highlights: Pioneered a real-time traffic edge system, yielding a co-authored patent and presenting the Best Startup Pitch at AICTE IDE 2025
Designed a fault-tolerant backend for a 15-agent AI SaaS, ensuring resilience by analyzing external API latency and introducing exponential-backoff retries to mitigate cascading failures
